name: capsicum annuum
title: capsicum annuum benefits
description: Capsicum annuum lowers blood pressure by reducing the levels of systolic and diastolic blood pressure in individuals, which is defined as the force of blood against the walls of the arteries. This benefit is important because high blood pressure is a major risk factor for cardiovascular diseases, such as heart attacks, strokes, and kidney disease, which can lead to disability and even death.
